# BarrelBook

> AI-powered bourbon and whiskey collection app for iOS.

BarrelBook helps whiskey enthusiasts catalog, organize, and track their bottle collections using AI-powered image recognition.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad)
- AI: Uses computer vision to identify bottles from photos
- Features: Bottle scanning, manual entry, collection catalog, price tracking (MSRP and secondary market)
- Backend: Firebase (authentication and cloud sync)
- Website: https://www.barrelbook.app
- App Store: Available on the Apple App Store

## Site Pages

- / — Landing page with app overview, features, pricing, and App Store reviews
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service

## Contact

- Website: https://www.barrelbook.app
